description:
## Goal

Build `embed_corpus.py` — embeds every chunk in `corpus/` and upserts into the configured vector store with full metadata.

## File Location

`scripts/embed_corpus.py`

## CLI

```
embed_corpus.py [--resume] [--reindex] [--tradition X] [--text Y]
```

## Responsibilities

1. Load `config/embedding.toml`; instantiate the configured embedding provider and vector backend.
2. Walk `corpus/**/chunks/*.toml`; for each chunk, build the metadata dict (id, tradition, text_id, text_name, section, translator, token_count, concepts).
3. If `guru.db` is reachable, populate `concepts` from accepted EXPRESSES edges; otherwise leave `concepts=[]` for later backfill.
4. Embed `content.body` and upsert (id, vector, metadata).
5. Track which chunk IDs are already indexed; `--resume` skips them; `--reindex` ignores the cache and re-embeds everything.

## Subtasks (from doc)

- Embedding model abstraction (ollama / sentence_transformers / API)
- Vector store abstraction (ChromaDB / Qdrant)
- Progress tracking + `--resume`
- Metadata construction from chunk TOML + guru.db

## Acceptance Criteria

- Vector count == chunk count after a full run
- All metadata fields present and correctly typed
- `--resume` and `--reindex` both behave as documented
- Provider/backend swappable via config alone

resolution.note: scripts/embed_corpus.py + vector_store.py: 120 chunks embedded into ChromaDB via nomic-embed-text in ~4s. scripts/llm.py: shared provider abstraction — llamacpp (raw urllib, no openai SDK, handles thinking models via reasoning_content fallback), ollama (native API), anthropic, openai. tag_concepts.py and propose_edges.py both updated to use llm.py. Default provider=llamacpp/Carnice-27b-Q4_K_M.gguf at 127.0.0.1:8080. Tested: ~11s/chunk on 27B Q4.
